h476f08f5g476eg4f59gbedfg06d3f4d4f72f: I might have preferred strife to stealth - but I'll not deny the spoils.
h38950e52gf737g4539g9b9cg8be5078c3c3a: Retreat is the coward's way - but I'll not deny our gains.
hc1490418g5022g48e5ga9aeg17596fc940c3: Not every fight is worth having. I'd rather save my energy.
hf2083b2dg5c09g4ea3g92d9g1a86538ebc0d: Battle is only imprudent if you cannot expect to win.
h64631731g18ceg40aega9f4g2877875a395e: Who cares about cowardice with a valuable amulet in hand?
he34305ebg5445g43ecg97ddg697c17c153a0: You find your worth in the trophy. I find my worth in the struggle.
hb9ec88a7g89d5g4ce3gb7dfg14b49b5716d5: See that you do not deny me too often.
h195d1777g5a29g423fga727gbbfdd8d1a2a0: Vlaakith herself favours prudence to recklessness.
hc4b47e69g245fg4562gbb3agd7e2407f13f7: You would preach to me about recklessness?
hdcf023e2g9643g489bga5adge5c21af11125: What is reckless is to invoke my beloved Queen's name to justify your fear.
h8f865be6gaaf3g4505g9770g69159fece259: Fill your pack, and let us depart. When next you speak, I expect wiser words.
he120f96dg3600g4be2ga19bg823d48d82b43: The corpses are better fighters than many who draw breath in this world. Curious.
h8bd0a1a4gca48g4ee4ga20fg88c68b8b54a8: Doesn't all that arrogance get tiring?
hfcaae68eg6708g4947ga855gc73e12dba47e: No more tiring than your gripes, I assure you.
hc17fbb2fgb62cg4284ga09agfc6132967392: Let us fill our packs and depart. Perhaps you can make room in your busy snivelling schedule.
h04e356f7ga11eg4adbga051g2a754005e824: Victory is sweetest when one's mettle is tested.
hd5b54f49g09e7g45a5g9702gb30793a75fa4: Words Vlaakith herself might have uttered. You prove yourself a true child of Gith.
hb63498e4ge160g46a1ga69bg3c8aa97f09c8: Let us fill our packs and depart. The dead need no trinkets - but we might make use of them.
h60c343a7g794eg4860g9c42g272839bcd972: Words Vlaakith herself might have uttered.
hab2485dfga512g4e21gadd7gbfe2ddd8e012: You are either wiser than you seem - or you seek to appease me. I shall presume the latter.
h0fb0ec70gaa1eg4f49gb51fg6ddfdc456f08: Maybe we shouldn't be plundering chapels full of holy warriors.
h610e4d34g4d1dg487fg9308gff44bf7861b7: Chk. This ground is no more holy than the bones that rose from it.
h906d8c4bg3b1dg4b5bg8bf8g186a59da833c: They have no use for such trinkets. We can make use of them instead.
